codex.notes: Install the full canonical skill folder. Codex uses SKILL.md for behavior and agents/openai.yaml for UI-facing metadata.

claude-code.notes: Install the same canonical SKILL.md and references. Claude-specific commands or hooks are planned and should remain thin wrappers, not duplicated skill logic.

generic.notes: Copies SKILL.md and references to a selected directory for harnesses without a formal adapter.
